---
title: "Week 11: Continuous Integration"
subtitle: "CI/CD Pipelines and Automated Testing"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Reading Assignment
Complete this reading before Week 12.
:::

## Overview

*Content coming soon.*

## Key Concepts

- GitHub Actions workflows
- Automated testing strategies
- Deployment pipelines
- Quality gates and code review

## Further Reading

- [What is CI CD?](https://www.redhat.com/en/topics/devops/what-is-ci-cd)
- [Understanding CI CD](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prescriptive-guidance/latest/strategy-cicd-litmus/understanding-cicd.html)
- [Understanding Github Actions](https://docs.github.com/en/actions/get-started/understand-github-actions)
- [AWS Codebuild](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/codebuild/latest/userguide/action-runner-overview.html)
